creator: empty.japan
caption: 📍 Location: For an amazing experience filled with Japanese nature and Princess Mononoke vibes, I suggest a hike starting from the Kinosaki bus stop along the river till Hozukyo JR station. The best time for that hike is spring and autumn 😍🌿
